About me

Rusiru D. Mendis

I’m a junior graphic designer passionate about creating visually compelling & impactful designs.

With a strong foundation in visual design and a deep understanding, I bring ideas to life through thoughtful design, smooth effects, and responsive layouts.

what I can do for you

As a digital designer, I am a visual storyteller, crafting experiences that connect deeply and spark creativity.

1. Presentation Design

Professional business presentations

Pitch decks & slides

Clean and modern layouts

Infographics and visual storytelling

2. Label & Packaging Design

Product label design

Packaging concepts

Brand-consistent visuals

Print-ready designs with proper sizing and layout

3. Social Media Design

Social media posts & banners

Ad creatives

YouTube thumbnails

Engaging visual content

4. Branding

Typography & color selection

Logo design (modern & minimal)

Brand identity creation

Visual style guides

5. Book Cover Design

Creative book covers

Eye-catching cover concepts that attract readers

eBook & print-ready designs

Genre-specific styles

My Tech Stack

I build with intention—using the right tools to create clean, modern, and impactful designs.

Adobe Photoshop

Creating high-quality graphics, social media designs, and photo editing.

Adobe Illustrator

Designing logos, vector graphics, and scalable brand assets.

Affinity Suite

Crafting high-quality graphics, layouts, and visual content with precision and flexibility.

Microsoft PowerPoint

Creating high-quality, modern presentations and professional pitch decks.

Framer

My creative playground for building interactive and responsive websites—fast, flexible, and no code.

Design with Strategy and Creativity

My process combines creativity and strategy to deliver designs that effectively communicate your message and meet your goals.

01.

Research & Strategy

I start by understanding your brand, target audience, and project goals to ensure the design aligns perfectly with your vision.

01.

Research & Strategy

I start by understanding your brand, target audience, and project goals to ensure the design aligns perfectly with your vision.

02.

Concept & Ideation

I create initial design concepts based on your requirements, focusing on creativity, clarity, and visual impact.

02.

Concept & Ideation

I create initial design concepts based on your requirements, focusing on creativity, clarity, and visual impact.

03.

Feedback & Refinement

Collaboration is key. I review the design with you, gather feedback, and refine the work to align with your expectations and goals. This ensures the design reflects your vision.

03.

Feedback & Refinement

Collaboration is key. I review the design with you, gather feedback, and refine the work to align with your expectations and goals. This ensures the design reflects your vision.

03.

Feedback & Refinement

Collaboration is key. I review the design with you, gather feedback, and refine the work to align with your expectations and goals. This ensures the design reflects your vision.

04.

Finalization

Once approved, I finalize the design with high-quality details and prepare it for delivery.

04.

Finalization

04.

Finalization

Once approved, I finalize the design with high-quality details and prepare it for delivery.

05.

Optimization & Delivery

Once everything is finalized, You receive the final files in the required formats, ready for use across digital or print platforms. also provide guidance or support for ensure success.
